zh: 我昨晚八点在看电视。
en: I was watching TV at eight last night.

zh: 她那时正在做作业。
en: She was doing her homework at that time.

zh: 他们那时正在踢足球。
en: They were playing football at that time.

zh: 妈妈那时正在做饭。
en: Mum was cooking at that time.

zh: 我昨天下午三点在睡觉。
en: I was sleeping at three yesterday afternoon.

zh: 他们那时正在开会。
en: They were having a meeting at that time.

zh: 她那时没有在哭。
en: She was not crying at that time.

zh: 我那时没有在听音乐。
en: I was not listening to music at that time.

zh: 你昨晚九点在做什么？
en: What were you doing at nine last night?

zh: 他们那时在哪里玩？
en: Where were they playing at that time?

zh: 你那时在学习吗？
en: Were you studying at that time?

zh: 是的，我在学习。
en: Yes, I was.

zh: 不，我没有在学习。
en: No, I was not.

zh: 他那时正在写信。
en: He was writing a letter at that time.

zh: 我们那时正在唱歌。
en: We were singing at that time.

zh: 当我进来时，他正在睡觉。
en: He was sleeping when I came in.

zh: 当电话响时，她正在洗澡。
en: She was taking a shower when the phone rang.

zh: 当老师进来时，学生们正在说话。
en: The students were talking when the teacher came in.

zh: 当我到达时，他们正在吃晚饭。
en: They were having dinner when I arrived.

zh: 当灯灭了时，我正在看书。
en: I was reading when the lights went out.

zh: 他在学习时，我在看电视。
en: While he was studying, I was watching TV.

zh: 她在唱歌时，他在弹吉他。
en: While she was singing, he was playing the guitar.

zh: 我在做饭时，孩子们在玩耍。
en: While I was cooking, the children were playing.

zh: 当他们在聊天时，我在写作业。
en: While they were chatting, I was doing my homework.

zh: 当我在等车时，开始下雨了。
en: It started to rain while I was waiting for the bus.

zh: 当她在购物时，她遇见了老朋友。
en: She met an old friend while she was shopping.

zh: 当他在跑步时，他摔倒了。
en: He fell down while he was running.

zh: 当我在睡觉时，有人敲门。
en: Someone knocked at the door while I was sleeping.

zh: 当他们在开会时，停电了。
en: The power went out while they were having a meeting.

zh: 当我在散步时，我发现了一个钱包。
en: I found a wallet while I was taking a walk.
